title: Acana Advanced Safety Moisture Trap & Freshener - Ideal for Larger Rooms & Spaces - Dehumidifier for Damp, Mould - Moisture in your Home, Caravan, Kitchen, Bathroom, Bedroom, Garage, Office
features: ACANA'S ADVANCED SAFETY MOISTURE CONTROL SYSTEM - Covers all areas around your home including bathrooms, kitchens, garages, caravans, offices, large spaces
UNIQUE CARTRIDGE SYSTEM - Stylish unit is both lockable and refillable
ABSORBS UP TO 1000ml - Attracts and locks in moisture
REFILLABLE - Easily refillable with convenient safety cartridges
TRANSPARENT CONTAINER - Easy sight of container so you know when to replace cartridges
FOR LARGE ROOMS - Ideal for spaces of up to 45 cubic metres
